role_title: Senior Associate, Product Growth - Strategy and Operations

location.office_time_required: some time in-office and some time remote

level_signals: 3-5 years of experience in consulting, strategy, or operations
Reports to Manager of Drive Strategy and Operations

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 3-5 years of experience in consulting, strategy, or operations, and you're comfortable operating with and influencing sophisticated, large-scale partners and internal stakeholders.
you're comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and modeling in Excel.
You're an analytical powerhouse. You let data win arguments, and you're comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and modeling in Excel.
You take ownership. You proactively identify problems, operate independently and effectively in ambiguity with minimal guidance, and drive initiatives end-to-end without waiting for direction.

You're a builder, not just a scaler. You have the entrepreneurial instinct to take something from 0→1 — whether that's a new product, a new partnership model, or a go-to-market approach that doesn't exist yet.
You're a strong cross-functional operator. You influence without authority, communicate effectively, and align stakeholders across teams.
you're comfortable operating with and influencing sophisticated, large-scale partners and internal stakeholders.
You operate with urgency and resilience. You move quickly, prioritize effectively, and stay composed under pressure.

scope.surface: DoorDash Commerce Platform — Core Enterprise Drive (white label fulfillment), strategic Enterprise restaurant partners, platform-wide growth initiatives including pricing optimization and subscription benefits
scope.business_model: B2B2C — white label fulfillment platform for enterprise restaurants, grocers, and retailers; first-party ecommerce enablement
primary_metrics_inferred: Revenue and order growth for Enterprise restaurant partners
core_responsibilities: Own end-to-end growth strategy for DoorDash's largest Enterprise restaurant partners
Lead platform-wide growth bets such as 1P pricing optimization and post-checkout experience improvements
Use data to diagnose performance, design experiments, and measure impact
Work cross-functionally with Product, Operations, Sales, and Engineering to bring initiatives to life
Serve as primary point of contact for most strategic Enterprise restaurant partners
Go 0 to 1 on new products and services to expand TAM

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($87K–$128K base) with equity upside
Clear ownership scope — named platform (Commerce Platform / Drive) and partner type (Enterprise restaurants)
Role offers both portfolio management and platform-level strategic bets, providing broad impact
Comprehensive benefits package including 16 weeks paid parental leave and 401(k) match
red_flags: No specific cities listed for the hybrid role, making it unclear where in-office time is expected
Visa sponsorship not addressed in the JD
3-5 years experience range is stated but seniority expectations (0-to-1 platform bets, GM-style thinking) may imply higher experience needed in practice
Role blends account management, product strategy, and BizOps — scope may be broad and demanding for a single Senior Associate

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Associate', comp range, and years requirement)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description of Commerce Platform and Drive white label offering)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
location.cities_listed (not specified for this role; left empty)
ambiguities: The JD says 'We expect this role to be hybrid with some time in-office and some time remote' but does not specify which city or office; cities_listed left empty.

The years range '3-5 years' appears in a section titled 'We're Excited About You Because…' (preferred/cultural signals section) rather than a hard requirements section, but the language is unconditional ('You have 3-5 years'), so it has been classified as hard.
